cnbc.title: Trump is set to deliver an election-focused national address tonight. Here's what to know
cnbc.summary: "Without free and fair elections, you don't have a country," Trump said this week when asked to preview the speech.

cnbc.title: Netflix stock falls as earnings forecast disappoints, company says it will give fewer engagement updates
cnbc.summary: The streaming giant said it would cut back on the frequency of its "What We Watched" reports, which provide a picture of engagement.

cnbc.title: Microsoft's Nadella criticizes Anthropic's Fable for being 'editorially controlled'
cnbc.summary: Microsoft enjoys close ties to Anthropic, but it's also working to help companies refine models that keep their data private.

cnbc.title: SpaceX aborts Starship test flight, sending stock lower
cnbc.summary: Elon Musk said it would make another attempt "hopefully in a few days."  SpaceX completed the maiden test flight of its Starship V3 rocket in May.

cnbc.title: Oil pipelines around the Strait of Hormuz won't end the threat Iran poses to Middle East crude exports
cnbc.summary: Oil producers are building or contemplating new pipeline projects to bypass the Strait of Hormuz, but this infrastructure is still vulnerable, analysts said.

cnbc.title: Here's why the housing market is hurting so much this summer
cnbc.summary: Mortgage rates are high, home prices at record levels, and consumers stressed — all contributing to a drop in existing home sales and builder sentiment.

cnbc.title: Alphabet shares fall on report its most powerful AI model Gemini 3.5 Pro is delayed
cnbc.summary: Alphabet announced the Gemini 3.5 Pro AI  in May, saying it was being used internally but wouldn't be ready for a broader rollout until the following month.

cnbc.title: AG pick Blanche to meet with Epstein survivors after 2 GOP senators hedge on nomination
cnbc.summary: Sen. Thom Tillis, R-N.C., wants Todd Blanche to meet with victims of sex offender Jeffrey Epstein before committing his support for the nomination.

cnbc.title: Trump suspends teleprompter operator over Kalshi bets allegations, White House says
cnbc.summary: Kalshi retained most of the profits, which were more than $90,000, from the trades made on public statements by President Trump.

cnbc.title: The best states for workers to get educated, trained and find a job in America in 2026
cnbc.summary: These 11 U.S. states excel when it comes to the education level of their workforce, migration patterns, and workforce development programs.
